description:
crates/integral-wasm/src/lib.rs lines 701-718: Manual JSON string building
with hand-rolled escaping (only handles backslash and double-quote). Missing
control character escaping could produce invalid JSON.

Fix: Use serde_json::to_string() or serde_wasm_bindgen::to_value() instead
of manual string concatenation.
title: Replace manual JSON construction in WASM with serde_json
